# Mogamulizumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Mogamulizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Mogamulizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>18 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Mogamulizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Poteligeo is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with mycosis fungoides (MF) or Sézary syndrome (SS) who have received at least one prior systemic therapy.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>prostatic urethra urothelial carcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>kidney pelvis sarcomatoid transitional cell carcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>infiltrating bladder urothelial carcinoma sarcomatoid variant（99.4%）</li>
<li>renal pelvis papillary urothelial carcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>human herpesvirus 8-related tumor（99.2%）</li>
<li>ectomesenchymoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>malignant cutaneous granular cell skin tumor（99.2%）</li>
<li>middle ear neuroendocrine tumor（99.0%）</li>
<li>transitional cell carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>Richter syndrome（98.6%）</li>
<li>metastatic neoplasm（98.3%）</li>
<li>malignant spiradenoma（98.3%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>cutaneous neuroendocrine carcinoma（97.0%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（96.8%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（96.8%）</li>
<li>localized pagetoid reticulosis（96.8%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（96.7%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（96.6%）</li>
<li>liver neuroendocrine carcinoma（96.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/mogamulizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
